html:
Exclusive to:

The Tropical Parasol is the Shipwrecked version of the Pretty Parasol. It is also found in the Survival Tab, is always available to craft, but instead of using Cut Grass, it requires 3 Palm Leaves to craft. Similar to the Pretty Parasol, it is an easier to craft replacement for the Umbrella.

While equipped, it provides protection against Wetness and Overheating, and slowly restores Sanity. After it is crafted, it will slowly perish over time whether or not it is equipped. Unlike the Pretty Parasol, it cannot be used as Fuel.

There is a chance to acquire this item while spending Dubloons at the Slot Machine.

Gallery

  • Wilson holding a Tropical Parasol.
  • A Tropical Parasol dropped on the ground.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

The Tropical Parasol is the Shipwrecked version of the Pretty Parasol. It is also found in the Survival Tab, is always available to craft, but instead of using Cut Grass, it requires 3 Palm Leaves to craft. Similar to the Pretty Parasol, it is an easier to craft replacement for the Umbrella.
While equipped, it provides protection against Wetness and Overheating, and slowly restores Sanity. After it is crafted, it will slowly perish over time whether or not it is equipped. Unlike the Pretty Parasol, it cannot be used as Fuel.
There is a chance to acquire this item while spending Dubloons at the Slot Machine.

The '''Tropical Parasol''' is the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' version of the [[Pretty Parasol]]. It is also found in the [[Survival Tab]], is always available to craft, but instead of using [[Cut Grass]], it requires 3 [[Palm Leaf|Palm Leaves]] to craft. Similar to the Pretty Parasol, it is an easier to craft replacement for the [[Umbrella]].

While equipped, it provides protection against [[Wetness]] and [[Overheating]], and slowly restores [[Sanity]]. After it is crafted, it will slowly perish over time whether or not it is equipped. Unlike the [[Pretty Parasol]], it cannot be used as [[Fuel]].

There is a chance to acquire this item while spending [[Dubloons]] at the [[Slot Machine]].
